banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock company: 'Karoo Craft Traders (Pty) Ltd', a small South African-incorporated private company operating a retail craft/homeware trading business, with turnover (R853,000) and total assets (R620,000) both comfortably within the Micro Business thresholds (turnover ≤ R1,000,000, total assets ≤ R5,000,000). Filing ITR14 via SARS eFiling as a Micro Business (Annexure C), filed through a registered tax practitioner, with no Voluntary Disclosure Programme application, no Special Economic Zone claim, no capital gains/losses, one beneficial owner (the sole director/shareholder), a single class of ordinary shares, a small section 18A donation, and three pre-populated IRP5 PAYE credits. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real company's information.

collectedValues.label: Company classification
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §13(a), §13.1.3(i) — 'Return Type... pre-populated... with one of the following return types: Dormant / Body Corporate/Share Block Company / Micro business / Small Company / Medium to Large Company'

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective requiredness from the schema's own requiredWhen/required members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator written from scratch for this run), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all fields in schema.fields. A mutation test (flipping hadCryptoAssetTransactionsExcludingCgt to true without adding the now-required cryptoAssetsIncludedInIncomeStatement/cryptoAssetTransactionsResultedInProfit/amountOfCryptoAssetsInBalanceSheet fields) confirmed the evaluator correctly flags the newly-required fields as violations — the evaluator is not just trivially passing every input.
